lines.text: You spilled champagne on my leather pants.
We do not wait in line. We break the line.
You are dancing on the subwoofer.
Oh, oh, oh! The glitter in my hair!
Oh, oh, oh! Like I just don't care!
Dancing on the table, I won't be tamed!
Too cheap, too loud, making such a scene!
I’m the messiest girl that you've ever seen!
Your mascara is running down your face.
Throw your drink in the air.
Dancing on the table, I won't be tamed!
Too cheap, too loud, making such a scene!
I’m the messiest girl that you've ever seen!
[Male] Mmm. Put it on my tab.
The club is ugly in the light.
Yes, even though it is dark outside.
We are getting in the taxi.
Do not tell the driver where we are going.
Oh, oh, oh! The sun is gonna rise!
Oh, oh, oh! I have stars in my eyes!
Ciao ciao! The night is over but the bass is loud!
Ciao ciao! Let's find an afterparty in the crowd!
Still hot, still moist, we’re dancing in the street!
I’ll never go to sleep, I just need the beat!
But the stereo is very good.
Ciao ciao! The night is over but the bass is loud!
Ciao ciao! Let's find an afterparty in the crowd!
Still hot, still moist, we’re dancing in the street!
I’ll never go to sleep, I just need the beat!
My spaceship is parked outside the club.
It is shaped like a giant saucer.
Do you want to see my cockpit?
Everybody dancing in the Milky Way!
Look at my glowing green stick.
Oh, oh, oh! We're leaving the atmosphere!
Oh, oh, oh! The stars are so crystal clear!
Abduct me baby, take me to the stars!
We'll do the Eurodance all the way to Mars!
Flying in your saucer, zooming through the night!
Shameless in the galaxy, traveling at light!

Mmm. The probe is very cold.

Oh, oh, oh! The engines are so loud!
Take me up into the sky, flying in the aeroplane!
Riding in the captain's chair, driving me insane!
Cruising at a mile high, shaking in the turbulence!
Shameless in the passenger seat, lacking common sense!
(Heavy relentless four-on-the-floor beat, jet engine whoosh sounds)

Mmm. It goes all the way back.

Don't stop until it is fully inflated.

They are very long. And very sharp.

Are you afraid of the dark?
Let me taste your sweet plasma.

Bite me in the dark, make me yours tonight!
Dancing in the dungeon in the pale moonlight!
Sucking on my neck, you're driving me insane!
Shameless little vampire pumping through my vein!

Oh, oh, oh! It's totally surprising!
Put out the fire, water spraying everywhere!
Sliding down the pole, flying through the smoky air!
Pumping up the pressure, blasting from the hydrant now!
Shameless in the burning room, making me say wow wow wow!

Give me mouth to mouth, don't let me down!
I’m the sickest girl in this disco town!
Resuscitate me, save my life tonight!
Doctor, doctor, won't you do it right!
